name: Ultimate Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix dry ingredients (flour, vanilla extract, baking soda) in a small bowl.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg, then mix in the chopped chocolate.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the batter, stirring until just combined.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
8. Makes 36 to 48 cookies.
